breakingChangesNotes: The **Search And Delete Emails - Generic v2** playbook no longer uses the deprecated O365 Security & Compliance (Search And Delete Emails - Office 365) sub-playbook. It has been replaced with the new **Microsoft Graph Security - Search And Delete Emails** sub-playbook, which uses the Microsoft Graph eDiscovery API. Installations relying on the O365 S&C integration for email deletion must migrate to the Microsoft Graph Security integration.
